channel.title: NAG Nuovo, E Tili, D Suster, E Matys, L Hupp, C Magro | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAG Nuovo, E Tili, D Suster, E Matys, L Hupp, C Magro

image.title: NAG Nuovo, E Tili, D Suster, E Matys, L Hupp, C Magro

item.title: Strong homology between SARS-CoV-2 envelope protein and a Mycobacterium sp. antigen allows rapid diagnosis of Mycobacterial infections and may provide specific anti-SARS-CoV-2 immunity via the BCG vaccine.
